title: Your Financial Advisor Can Legally Rip You Off
hook: Most financial advisors in America have zero legal obligation to act in your best interest — and that loophole costs Americans $17 billion every single year.
angle: The fiduciary vs. suitability distinction is almost never explained to clients, yet it determines whether your advisor is legally your ally or legally your adversary — earning fat commissions on products that hurt you.
audience: Anyone with a financial advisor, 401k, annuity, or life insurance policy — especially people who assumed their advisor was on their side
key_numbers: $17 billion lost per year from conflicted advisor advice (DOL study)
Only 15% of advisors are legally required fiduciaries
7% upfront commission advisors can legally pocket on annuities
$187,000 lost on $100K over 30 years from just 1% in hidden fees
